# Light Water Capital

> Private capital management and family office based in Corydon, Indiana.

Light Water Capital is a private investment firm that manages capital for a select number of clients with a long-term, conviction-based approach. We combine quantitative research with fundamental judgment.

## Pages

- Home: https://www.lightwatercapital.com/
- Blog / Perspectives: https://www.lightwatercapital.com/blog/

## Recent Articles

- [On patience in capital allocation](https://www.lightwatercapital.com/blog/on-patience-in-capital-allocation/) — March 2026
- [What quantitative research can — and cannot — do](https://www.lightwatercapital.com/blog/what-quantitative-research-can-and-cannot-do/) — February 2026
- [The case for concentration](https://www.lightwatercapital.com/blog/the-case-for-concentration/) — January 2026

## About

- Location: Corydon, Indiana, USA
- Type: Private capital management, family office
- Focus: Long-term investment, quantitative research, portfolio construction
